title: Time Trap
description: Mine, kill, dance with the time.
body:
# This datapack is archived!

## Background(perhaps)
You gained the curse, the time that Sophon(just kidding) prints on your pupil is passing...

but the way to defeat it is to kill Enderdragon?!

You need to mine ores and consume them to add your time,

Put the cooked ores into cauldron one by one or sneaking on ore blocks to consum them.
## Features
This datapack is inspired by: [TimeTrap [ Gametype ] - byBrutec - YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ace5_aA2XkE)

This datapack begins with "jk_tt" in scoreboard and functions, so it does not conflict with others.

There are 2 ways to consume cooked ores: by sneaking on their blocks or throw them into cauldron 1 by 1.

There are 3 difficulty mode, which means how hard to get scores.

There are many benifits, such as no death-drop, night vision, initial tools...

There is a switch for "kill dragon" or "get to 2 hours first" to win a game.

You can modify ore scores in game.

You can play solo or multiplayers (with auto team distribution).

You can earn scores by killing rivals in multi-mode.

Click [lang] to switch your language.(only zh-cn & en-us now)
